title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Tarakasura and his cohorts launch a relentless assault on Kailash, the Devas rise to its defense with unwavering courage. Will their valor and determination be enough to safeguard the sacred abode of Lord Shiva?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Tarakasura confronts Lord Shiva with the sinister intention of ending his unborn child's life, Lord Shiva is consumed with fury and issues a stern warning, foretelling unforeseen consequences. What unexpected fate awaits Tarakasura as he dares.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva consoles Goddess Parvati, revealing Devi Swaroopa's sacrifice. Trouble brews at the ashram as Devi Swaroopa unveils her pregnancy truth.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shambuki's decision to deliver her babies alone adds to the tension for Diti and Tarakasura. Meanwhile, Tarakasura is overjoyed as the protectors of the Asura empire descend. The unfolding events are bound to shape the future of the Asura empire.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's three sons, Tarakaksha, Vidyunmali, and Kamalaksha, possess immense power. Shambuki discloses that they are engaged in rigorous penance to appease Brahma Deva and obtain a crucial boon. Will Brahma Deva grant their earnest request?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati are overwhelmed with eternal joy as Devi Swaroopa brings forth their son, Kartikeya, after receiving a boon from Lord Brahma. How will the divine couple's hearts swell with love when they cradle their newborn.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shankachuda, having lost his men in the battle, extends an invitation to Kartikeya to confront Tarakasura. Will Kartikeya accept Shankachuda's challenge and face Tarakasura in battle?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva chooses to partake in the feast sent by Nandi and the devotees instead of Kartikeya's offering, which disappoints Parvati. Later, Shiva becomes concerned when Kartikeya discovers their true relationship.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Anand arrives at CSP's house late at night demanding to talk to him. CSP invites him inside and finds out the reason for his sudden disappearance.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rashmi is surprised when Niranjan arrives and expresses his eagerness to marry Janaki. Marred by her own guilt, Rashmi confesses to Niranjan that Janaki is unaware of him not being an IAS officer. How will Niranjan react to Rashmi's revelation?

title: Ishtakamya
subTitle: Doctor Aakarsh, who is separated from his wife, Adithi, falls in love with another girl, Acchari. He is caught in a fix when his estranged wife comes back.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Palli decides to win Vittal's approval and tries to commit a noble deed. However, Palli's plans backfire drastically.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal announces his plans to take Lalithamba out on a honeymoon. However, Vishalu convinces Lalithamba to cancel the trip.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Lalithamba is shocked when a doctor's report reveals she only has a few days left to live. Soon, she begins acting differently around her family.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Lalithamba sees leftover food, she grows furious and confronts her family. However, unaware of the source of her fury, her family confesses to other crimes.

subTitle: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

subTitle: Doctor Aakarsh, who is separated from his wife, Adithi, falls in love with another girl, Acchari. He is caught in a fix when his estranged wife comes back.

title: Jaganmathe
subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Sanjana secretly enters the guest house where Varun Vaibhav is staying and hides behind the door. As Varun Vaibhav enters the room, she confronts him about his identity and claims him as her husband Gautham.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After secretly recording Varun Vaibhav's confession, Sanjana produces the proof to Janaki. Upon hearing the audio clip, Janaki suggests that she file a complaint and informs Anand about the case details.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Dr. Vittal experiences a life-changing shock when he is electrocuted and gains magnetic powers. However, Vittal situation turns sideways when an old lady friend falls for his magnetic attraction.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Silli ignores NML's hard work and begins to question her loyalty to the family. Later, Silli devises a comprehensive strategy to determine if NML is leaving the family for a high-paying job.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Considering Pandu as her husband, Bale Bangara orders Pandu to sell vegetables in the market. Further, as Srimathi brings the vegetable seller who is Pandu's lookalike to the house, both the ladies fight for their husband.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Pandu puts forth a challenge to Srimathi and Chaaru. While the women have to go to the office and work, the men of the house will take care of the household chores.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Kartikeya suggests Parvati and Shankar to give an invitation card to all the Gods for Ganpati's Vrat Bandhan ceremony. Parvati, Shankar and all the other Gods like the new idea of invitation cards.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Ganesha is welcomed by everyone after his victory against the Daithyas. Brahma Dev misunderstands Mahadev. Parvati is worried about Ganesha as he goes to the gurukul.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Lord Ganesh leaves Kailash and reaches Devkul with Devi Parvati, Lord Mahadev and Karthik, to begin with his Gurukul studies. Lord Brahma, out of anger, decides to create a new world to prove his importance to Shankar Mahadev.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Brahmadev decides to recreate the universe, and the gods are worried. After consulting with Ganesh, Shiva transforms into Batuk Bhairav and appears before Parvati, demanding to meet Brahmadev.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: After the conclusion of Niranjan and Janaki's wedding, the fake parents hired by Chandu Bargi ask for their payment. Just as Chandu is about to pay them, Janaki walks in and notices the exchange.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: With the wedding concluded, Chandu Bargi calls Niranjan aside to find out how he pulled off being a fake IAS officer. After Niranjan fills him in, Chandu offers to pay for his mother's treatment, but Niranjan refuses his help.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As the newlyweds settle into their daily routine, Rashmi suggests that Janaki and Niranjan visit a temple. Inspired by the idea, Janaki proposes that the whole family go for a trip. Will Niranjan support Janaki's idea?

title: Vaasu Naan Pakka Commercial
subTitle: Vaasu is the typical happy-go-lucky youngster. He lands up at a police station, where he asks the inspector to write an FIR that he will kill his girlfriend. When questioned why, one gets to listen to his love story, which is 'pakka commercial'.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Silli and Lalithamba give Vittal a new idea to uplift his failing business. However, their idea lands him in trouble with the medical association.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When NML's brother, Mohan Kumar, comes to visit, Vittal grows resentful of his growing closeness with Lalithamba.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Lalithamba unknowingly gives Vittal's luxury umbrella away to a recycler, he becomes desperate to get it back.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal brags about his own prowess in front of a deadly goon. Soon, the goon challenges Vittal to prove his worth.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: A young man struggles to pay off his father's debts and decides to visit his family's abandoned bungalow. However, he soon realises that it is haunted by a vengeful ghost.

title: Naduve Antaravirali
subTitle: Sanjay and Nitya fall in love with each other despite facing opposition from their peers. They soon become intimate and Nitya gets pregnant, which causes problems in their lives.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Varun Vaibhav refuses to appear at the police station for questioning, Janaki suspects foul play by him. She gathers Niranjan's family members and explains to them the difficulties that they may face during the interrogation.

subTitle: Afraid of getting caught, Varun Vaibhav visits Chandu's house and informs him about Sanjana's complaint against him.

subTitle: Ranganath and Vishalu strike gold when they find what they believe is a treasure map. Soon, they consult an astrologer for help.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal reunites with an old friend but struggles to remember his name. Soon, he comes up with a complex plan to uncover his friend's identity.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal decides to prove a point to Lalithamba and hires a thief to target her. However, his actions have unintended consequences.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vittal lands in trouble when an old man accuses him of giving him the wrong medication. Soon, he enlists Lalithamba's help to fix the situation.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Vishal orders Ranganath to buy her a saree, he goes through increasingly bizarre means to make quick money.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: When Vittal learns that he might be in danger, he hires a bodyguard. However, when the bodyguard turns out to be a woman, Lalithamba instantly becomes jealous.

title: Silli Lalli
subTitle: Vishalu and the others see a woman crying and decide to help her for some publicity. However, their decision brings them unexpected trouble.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As per Janaki's suggestion, the family goes on a trip to the temple along with Niranjan. Coincidentally, CSP and his family also arrive at the same temple. CSP talks to Janaki in private and confesses that he really wanted to attend her wedding.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Rashmi, who is delighted to see Madhukar at the temple, introduces herself as Chandu Bargi's wife and talks to him in private. As Madhukar remembers his mother and gets emotional, Rashmi consoles him. Will he realise that Rashmi is his real mother?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Chandu is inquisitive to know about Janaki's conversation with CSP and asks her about the same. When she speaks highly about CSP, an annoyed Chandu asks her not to believe a word he speaks.

subTitle: Madha is in love with Manasi, but she has feelings for someone else. Soon, he helps her unite with her lover and also strives to save her from some goons.

subTitle: Vittal's friends hear about his prized umbrella and decide to hunt it down. However, Lalithamba grows annoyed with the object and decides to give it away.

subTitle: Ranganath has reported the tragic death of Lalli in a plane crash. Later, Ranganath explains that Lalli, who was on her way to China to combat the coronavirus pandemic, tragically passed away.

title: Magalu Janaki
